mapper.select: SELECT VISIT_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, DESIGNER_ID, SURVEY_TOKEN, TOKEN_EXPIRES_DT, STATUS, VISIT_DT FROM tb_visit_record WHERE SURVEY_TOKEN = #{token}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_visit_record SET STATUS = 'SUBMITTED', VISIT_ROUTE = #{visit.visitRoute}, REF_DESIGNER = #{visit.refDesigner}, SERVICES = #{visit.services}, MOODS = #{visit.moods, typeHandler=com.strnd.api.common.typehandler.JsonStringListTypeHandler}, STYLE_IMAGE_IDS = #{visit.styleImageIds, typeHandler=com.strnd.api.common.typehandler.JsonLongListTypeHandler}, HAIR_CONCERNS = #{visit.hairConcerns, typeHandler=com.strnd.api.common.typehandler.JsonStringListTypeHandler}, REQUEST_MEMO = #{visit.requestMemo}, SUBMIT_DT = NOW(), MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE VISIT_ID = #{visit.visitId}
